dashboard.upToDate: Your health sanctuary is up to date.

upload.title: Securely Upload Your Clinical Data
upload.subtitle: Add your medical records for processing. We support PDF, PNG, JPG, and JPEG formats. Your data is encrypted and handled with clinical precision.
upload.comfortLang: Select your comfort language for the AI clinical summary.
upload.privacyDesc: Files are HIPAA-compliant and automatically purged after extraction unless saved to your vault.
upload.uploadFile: Please upload at least one file.

predict.title: Health Predictions
predict.subtitle: Get instant AI-powered health risk assessment. Select a condition and enter your health parameters.
predict.step2: Our ML model analyzes the data
predict.heartDesc: Predicts the likelihood of heart disease using 13 clinical parameters. Based on the Cleveland Heart Disease dataset and Random Forest classification.
predict.diabetesDesc: Predicts diabetes risk using 8 health indicators from the Pima Indians Diabetes dataset. Uses Random Forest classification.
predict.kidneyDesc: Predicts chronic kidney disease using 24 clinical features from the UCI CKD dataset. Uses XGBoost classification.
predict.cbcDesc: Predicts anemia from Complete Blood Count (CBC) data using 5 key blood markers. Uses Random Forest classification.

specialist.title: Specialist Directory
specialist.subtitle: Explore recommended doctors and find specialists near you. Check their contact info and clinic locations.
specialist.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, clinic or ailment...
specialist.nearbyDesc: Real-time hospitals and clinics near you. Drag the map to explore other areas. Click any facility to open in Google Maps.
specialist.contactDesc: Need assistance? Call our support line at +91 800-CLINIC.

aiChat.title: AI Assistant
aiChat.subtitle: Ask about your clinical reports or provide feedback
aiChat.greeting: Hello! I'm your Health Saathi AI assistant. I can help you understand your medical reports, answer health questions, or provide general health guidance. How can I help you today?
aiChat.placeholder: Ask about your health or reports...

landing.heroSubtitle: Transform complex blood reports, imaging scans, and prescriptions into clear, actionable insights within seconds.
landing.hipaaDesc: Encrypted, private, and secure storage for all clinical data.
landing.precisionDesc: We provide structural and technical clarity across all clinical documentation formats through our Health Saathi AI.
landing.bloodAnalysisDesc: Deconstruct CBC, metabolic panels, and lipid profiles into understandable trends with visual benchmarks.
landing.prescriptionsDesc: AI-powered drug interaction checks and simplified dosage schedules for clarity.
landing.healthPredictionsDesc: Heart, Diabetes, Kidney Disease, and CBC analysis powered by trained ML models.
landing.xrayDesc: Automated summarization of radiographic findings, highlighting key bone and tissue observations.
landing.ctaTitle: Step Into the Sanctuary of Clarity
landing.ctaSubtitle: Upload your first report today and experience the future of medical document management.
landing.footerDesc: The high-end editorial experience for medical diagnostic data. Clarity when you need it most.

reportInsights.title: Report Insights
reportInsights.noReportDesc: Upload a medical document or X-ray to see AI analysis results here.
reportInsights.subtitleXray: Comprehensive analysis for your Chest X-Ray. We've processed the data with our clinical AI.
reportInsights.subtitleMed: Comprehensive analysis for your Medical Report. We've processed the data with our clinical AI.
reportInsights.recommendedDesc: Based on your results, we recommend consulting a specialist.

dietPlan.title: Targeted Diet Plan
dietPlan.subtitle: Personalized nutrition based on your most recent clinical analysis.
dietPlan.noContextDesc: To generate an accurate, medically-safe diet plan, please upload and analyze your report or X-Ray first.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account preferences, notifications, and privacy settings.
settings.passwordDesc: Last changed exactly a year ago
settings.emailAlertsDesc: Receive emails for new medical reports
settings.smsRecapsDesc: Get SMS alerts for weekly checkups
settings.aiSuggestionsDesc: Personalized wellness routines based on your profile
settings.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently wipe your Health Saathi data.

specialistDir.pageSubtitle: Here are recommended doctors for you. Check contact info and locations to plan your treatment.
specialistDir.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, clinic or ailment...
specialistDir.nearbyDesc: Real-time hospitals and clinics near you. Drag the map to explore other areas. Click any facility to open in Google Maps.
